problem id: 021ed764
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHR(6)

examples:
  00110000 -> 11111111
  01101111 -> 11111010
  10101110 -> 11110111
  10001110 -> 11110101
  11111001 -> 11111011
  01001101 -> 11111010
  11101111 -> 11110010
  01000100 -> 11111110
  01110010 -> 11111111

query: 10000100
predicted answer: 11111101
